recurringPattern: Center-positioned overlay panel with a white rounded-card background, dark semi-transparent backdrop, close X icon in top-right, a title with optional description, and primary/secondary action buttons bottom-right aligned.
designHarm: The centered modal with darkened backdrop is applied to every interstitial interaction — confirmations, forms, details, settings — regardless of whether a non-modal approach (side panel, inline expansion, toast) would preserve context better. The close-X position (top-right) competes with the action buttons (bottom-right) for user attention. Every modal gets a title row even when the content is self-explanatory.
legitimateExceptions: Destructive actions that require confirmation (deletion, irreversible changes)
Forms that genuinely need exclusive focus (complex entry, multi-step)
possibleFixtures: Slide-in side panel for detail views
Inline confirmation within the page context
originalObservations: AI-generated modals always use the exact same centered card layout regardless of content type.
The backdrop opacity is consistently around 50% black with no variation.
Action buttons always use the primary/secondary pair aligned to the bottom-right.
The close X icon is always an SVG X mark in a 24x24 box, positioned top-right with no label.
